source.name: Awesome Codex Skills
source.description: Curated list from Awesome Codex Skills

items.name: brooks-lint
items.description: AI code reviews grounded in six classic engineering books — decay risk diagnostics with book citations, severity labels, and four analysis modes (PR review, architecture audit, tech debt, test quality).

items.name: bringyour-migration-auditor
items.description: Audit Claude Code to Codex harness migrations for AGENTS.md/CLAUDE.md scope, hooks, MCP config, skills, secrets, and validation notes.

items.name: codebase-migrate
items.description: Run large codebase migrations and multi-file refactors in reviewable batches with CI verification.
items.shortDescription: Codebase migrations + multi-file refactors

items.name: codebase-recon
items.description: Analyze git history to understand a codebase before reading any code — surfaces hotspots, bug magnets, bus factor, momentum, and high-risk files (hotspot ∩ bug-magnet) via auto-scaled analysis.

items.name: create-plan
items.description: Quickly draft concise execution plans for coding tasks.
items.shortDescription: Create a plan

items.name: deploy-pipeline
items.description: End-to-end Stripe → Supabase → Vercel release pipelines with verify and rollback.
items.shortDescription: Stripe/Supabase/Vercel deploy pipelines

items.name: Emdash Skills
items.description: 14-category autonomous product-building OS: CF Workers + Hono + Angular + D1 + Stripe. One-line prompts to deployed SaaS with 94 reference docs, 18 agents, and Codex-native `.agents/skills/` support.

items.name: gh-address-comments
items.description: Address review or issue comments on the open GitHub PR for the current branch using `gh`.
items.shortDescription: Address comments in a GitHub PR review

items.name: gh-fix-ci
items.description: Inspect failing GitHub Actions checks, summarize failures, and propose fixes.
items.shortDescription: Fix failing Github CI actions

items.name: mcp-builder
items.description: Build and evaluate MCP servers with best practices and an evaluation harness.

items.name: pr-review-ci-fix
items.description: Automated GitHub/GitLab PR review plus CI auto-fix loop via the Composio CLI.
items.shortDescription: Automated PR review + CI auto-fix across GitHub/GitLab

items.name: sentry-triage
items.description: Diagnose Sentry issues by mapping stack frames to local source — no copy-paste.
items.shortDescription: Sentry error diagnosis via the Composio CLI

items.name: webapp-testing
items.description: Run targeted web app tests and summarize results.

items.name: AuraKit
items.description: All-in-one skill framework: 46 modes, 23 sub-agents, 6-layer OWASP security, 10 lifecycle hooks, ~55% token savings.

items.name: Vibe-Skills
items.description: Governed Codex skill harness for staged, test-driven work: routes 340+ skills through requirement freeze, plan approval, execution, verification evidence, and cross-session memory.

items.name: polywave
items.description: Parallel agent coordination with structural merge safety. Scout decomposes, Wave agents implement in isolated worktrees with disjoint file ownership. Same protocol on Claude Code and Codex.

items.name: connect
items.description: Connect Codex to 1000+ apps via the Composio CLI for real actions (Slack, GitHub, Notion, etc.).

items.name: connect-apps
items.description: Wire up Composio CLI connections for Claude and kick off app workflows from the shell.

items.name: issue-triage
items.description: Triage Linear or Jira backlogs and run bug sweeps from the terminal.
items.shortDescription: Linear/Jira triage + bug sweeps via the Composio CLI

items.name: linear
items.description: Manage issues, projects, and team workflows in Linear.
items.shortDescription: Manage Linear issues in Codex

items.name: meeting-insights-analyzer
items.description: Analyze meeting transcripts for themes, risks, and follow-ups.

items.name: meeting-notes-and-actions
items.description: Turn meeting transcripts into summaries with decisions and owner-tagged action items.
items.shortDescription: Meeting transcript to notes and actions

items.name: internal-comms
items.description: Craft internal announcements, updates, and stakeholder messaging.

items.name: invoice-organizer
items.description: Normalize and extract invoice data for tracking and reporting.

items.name: notion-knowledge-capture
items.description: Convert chats or notes into structured Notion pages with proper linking.
items.shortDescription: Capture conversations into structured Notion pages

items.name: notion-meeting-intelligence
items.description: Prepare meeting materials with Notion context plus Codex research.
items.shortDescription: Prep meetings with Notion context and tailored agendas

items.name: notion-research-documentation
items.description: Synthesize multiple Notion sources into briefs, comparisons, or reports with citations.
items.shortDescription: Research Notion content and produce briefs/reports

items.name: notion-spec-to-implementation
items.description: Turn Notion specs into implementation plans, tasks, and progress tracking.
items.shortDescription: Turn Notion specs into implementation plans, tasks, and progress tracking

items.name: support-ticket-triage
items.description: Triage customer support tickets with categories, priority, next actions, and draft replies.
items.shortDescription: Categorize and respond to support tickets

items.name: file-organizer
items.description: Organize, rename, and tidy files to keep workspaces clean.

items.name: paperjsx
items.description: Generate PPTX presentations, DOCX documents, XLSX spreadsheets, and PDF invoices/reports/charts from structured JSON. Runs locally via `@paperjsx/mcp-server` — no API key, no network calls.

items.name: skill-share
items.description: Share skills and reusable instructions across teammates.

items.name: codex-sms-verification
items.description: real-SIM SMS verification for AI agents via VirtualSMS MCP. 145+ countries, 2000+ services, both hosted (mcp.virtualsms.io) and local stdio transports.

items.name: email-draft-polish
items.description: Draft, rewrite, or condense emails for the right tone and audience.
items.shortDescription: Draft or polish emails to fit tone/length

items.name: changelog-generator
items.description: Create clear changelogs from commits or summaries.

items.name: content-research-writer
items.description: Research and draft content with sourced citations.

items.name: diasporic-intelligence
items.description: source-credit skill for consent-governed lineage AI with attribution, provenance, revocation, and non-impersonation boundaries.

items.name: novel-writing
items.description: public Codex skill for fiction planning, chapter drafting, scene continuation, and revision.

items.name: tailored-resume-generator
items.description: Tailor resumes to job descriptions with quantified impact.

items.name: unslop
items.description: CLI and MCP server that removes AI writing patterns from text: tricolons, em-dash overuse, hedging stacks, and sycophancy openers. Works with Codex, Claude Code, Gemini CLI, and Cursor. Five intensity levels and a lint-only audit mode.

items.name: spreadsheet-formula-helper
items.description: Write and debug spreadsheet formulas, pivots, and array formulas.
items.shortDescription: Build/debug Excel or Sheets formulas

items.name: competitive-ads-extractor
items.description: Analyze competitor ads and extract structured insights.

items.name: datadog-logs
items.description: Filter Datadog logs from the shell via the Composio CLI, with JSON-friendly output and digest workflows.
items.shortDescription: Datadog log filtering via the Composio CLI

items.name: developer-growth-analysis
items.description: Analyze Codex chat history for coding patterns and learning gaps.

items.name: lead-research-assistant
items.description: Research leads and enrich records with firmographic data.

items.name: domain-name-brainstormer
items.description: Brainstorm available domain names with criteria and checks.

items.name: raffle-winner-picker
items.description: Randomly select winners with audit-friendly logs.

items.name: langsmith-fetch
items.description: Pull LangSmith project/test data for analysis.

items.name: helium-mcp
items.description: Search real-time news with bias scoring, get live market data, ML options pricing, and balanced news synthesis via MCP.

items.name: brand-guidelines
items.description: Apply OpenAI/Codex brand colors and typography to artifacts.

items.name: agent-deep-links
items.description: Build and validate deep links for Codex, Cursor, and VS Code with Slack-safe formatting and fallback guidance.

items.name: canvas-design
items.description: Generate structured canvas layouts and design artifacts.

items.name: image-enhancer
items.description: Upscale and refine images with configurable presets.

items.name: slack-gif-creator
items.description: Generate GIFs for Slack with captions and styling.

items.name: theme-factory
items.description: Create reusable theme tokens and palettes.

items.name: youtube-downloader
items.description: Download and prepare videos for offline review.

items.name: template-skill
items.description: Starter template for building new skills.

items.name: skill-installer
items.description: Helper scripts to install skills from curated lists or GitHub paths.
items.shortDescription: Install curated skills from openai/skills or other repos

items.name: skill-creator
items.description: Guidance for building effective Codex skills with progressive disclosure.
items.shortDescription: Create or update a skill
